selections.name: Doncic
selections.reason: Consistent high-level performer with elite speed figures (105+ last three). Tactical speed fits the pace scenario perfectly.

selections.name: Code Duello
selections.reason: Drawn inside and possesses early speed. Can control the pace or sit a perfect pocket trip.

selections.name: Double Jab
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of brilliance and fits the class level. Needs a clean break but has the late kick to hit the board.

selections.name: Charge For Gold
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Equipment change could spark improvement at a price.

danger_horse.name: Dakota Country
danger_horse.reason: Capable of closing into a hot pace if the front-runners duel.

selections.name: Magnificat
selections.reason: Standout on class and speed figures. With the scratch of Nooni, she becomes the overwhelming favorite.

selections.name: Revera
selections.reason: Solid graded stakes experience and tactical speed. Will get first run on the favorite.

selections.name: Syntax
selections.reason: Steps up in class but has been winning. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble.

selections.name: Antifona (fr)
selections.reason: Turf to dirt angle. Might find the pace too sharp but can pick up the pieces for the bottom of exotics.

selections.name: Will Happen
selections.reason: Drops into a softer spot and gets the rail. Tactical speed should play well here.

selections.name: Flamingo Star
selections.reason: Consistent runner who always fires. Should get a great stalking trip from the outside post.

selections.name: Queen Bay
selections.reason: Lightly raced with upside. Fresu takes the mount, signaling intent.

selections.name: Forum Confidential
selections.reason: Needs to improve on speed figures but the scratches thin the field out significantly.

selections.name: Pro Payne
selections.reason: Sharp morning workouts suggest readiness. Inside draw in a 5F sprint is a massive advantage.

selections.name: Pickitupthatsgood
selections.reason: Well-bred for early speed. Trainer McCarthy is dangerous with first-time starters.

selections.name: Janie Not Jeanie
selections.reason: Solid works and gets Fresu in the irons. Should be forwardly placed.

selections.name: Allons Y
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps her clear of the kickback. Has the pedigree to sprint.

danger_horse.name: Make Me Money
danger_horse.reason: Mendez/Maldonado combo is always a threat with young speed horses.

selections.name: Cortina D'amprezzo (ire)
selections.reason: European shipper dropping into maiden ranks. Rosario takes the mount; looks primed to graduate.

selections.name: Astronomically (ire)
selections.reason: Another Euro import with solid form. Hernandez riding is a major positive.

selections.name: Golden Hope
selections.reason: Has shown tactical speed in the past. Can sit a nice trip behind the leaders.

selections.name: Grey Matter
selections.reason: Rail draw saves ground. Needs to find a late kick but can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Fire Ban
danger_horse.reason: Has hit the board in similar spots and possesses enough late turn of foot to surprise.

selections.name: Battle School
selections.reason: Field decimated by scratches. This one has the best remaining speed figures and tactical advantage.

selections.name: Shady Gem
selections.reason: Outside draw is favorable in this sprint. Has shown early foot in previous starts.

selections.name: Cano For The Win
selections.reason: Most experienced runner left in the field. Drops in class and should be closing late.

selections.name: Chapter One
selections.reason: Jaramillo rides. Can improve enough in this weak field to hit the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Kiki Ride
danger_horse.reason: Has hit the board multiple times against similar company.

selections.name: Miss Mandalay (gb)
selections.reason: Classy European import who has adapted well. Hernandez rides, and she has the best late kick.

selections.name: Lee's Baby Girl
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with high speed figures. Will be pressing the pace from the outside.

selections.name: Not A Sinner (gb)
selections.reason: Fresu takes the mount. Has back class and can fire fresh off the bench.

selections.name: Nikolina
selections.reason: Frey rides. Has tactical speed to sit just off the leaders and get first run.

danger_horse.name: Fancy Facts
danger_horse.reason: Ayuso rides. Capable of outrunning her odds if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Secured Freedom
selections.reason: Standout on class and speed figures. Rosario rides, and the pace scenario favors his stalking style.

selections.name: Decisive Win
selections.reason: Main threat to the favorite. Has the early speed to dictate terms and could get brave on the lead.

selections.name: One More Freud
selections.reason: Rail draw saves ground. Mike Smith can work out a perfect trip sitting behind the speed.

selections.name: Mo Koko
selections.reason: Steps up in class but has upside. Can hit the board if the top two duel.

danger_horse.name: Court Of Appeal
danger_horse.reason: First start as a gelding. Equipment change could unlock hidden potential.

selections.name: Warm Sun And Brew
selections.reason: Downhill turf specialist. Outside post is ideal for this unique course layout to get a clean run.

selections.name: Frank Bullitt
selections.reason: Rosario rides. Has the tactical speed and agility required for the downhill crossing.

selections.name: Known Idea
selections.reason: Draws well outside. Can stalk the pace and pounce late.

selections.name: Chromeflash
selections.reason: Berrios takes the mount. Has shown flashes of brilliance and fits the class level.

danger_horse.name: Keep Dancin Nick
danger_horse.reason: Jaramillo rides. Capable of outrunning his odds if he handles the dirt crossing.
